title: Real-Time Tracking
description: Automatically detects the active window every 3 seconds using Win32 APIs. No manual input needed.

title: Productivity Goals
description: Set daily targets or limits. Track progress with visual bars and build streaks over consecutive days.

title: Live Dashboard
description: Today's screen time, top apps chart, hourly activity heatmap, and real-time productivity score.

title: App Categorization
description: Classify apps as Productive, Neutral, or Distracting. Auto-applies to all future sessions.

title: Reports & Analytics
description: Daily, weekly, monthly reports with trend lines, category breakdowns, and ranked app tables.

title: 100% Private
description: All data stored locally in SQLite. Zero network requests. Your data never leaves your machine.
